mapper.sql: c.id, c.owner_member_id as ownerMemberId, c.title, c.region_name as regionName, c.visibility, c.status, c.description, c.cover_image_url as coverImageUrl, c.curation_section as curationSection, c.curation_order as curationOrder, exists ( select 1 from members m where m.id = c.owner_member_id and m.role = 'ADMIN' ) as createdByAdmin, ( select count(*) from course_saves s where s.course_id = c.id ) as saveCount, c.created_at as createdAt, c.updated_at as updatedAt, c.deleted_at as deletedAt

s.course_id as courseId, s.from_course_item_id as fromCourseItemId, s.to_course_item_id as toCourseItemId, s.segment_order as segmentOrder, s.travel_mode as travelMode, s.duration_seconds as durationSeconds, s.distance_meters as distanceMeters

i.id, i.course_id as courseId, i.item_type as itemType, i.attraction_id as attractionId, i.note_id as noteId, i.position, i.day, i.memo, i.stay_minutes as stayMinutes, a.title as attractionTitle, n.title as noteTitle, case i.item_type when 'ATTRACTION' then a.title when 'NOTE' then n.title end as itemTitle, n.author_member_id as noteAuthorMemberId, i.created_at as createdAt
c.visibility = 'PUBLIC' and c.status = 'READY' and c.deleted_at is null
a.status = 'ACTIVE' and a.deleted_at is null and a.duplicate_of_attraction_id is null
n.visibility = 'PUBLIC' and n.status = 'ACTIVE' and n.deleted_at is null
, ST_Y(c.start_location) as startLatitude, ST_X(c.start_location) as startLongitude, ST_Distance( c.start_location::geography, ::geography ) as distanceMeters
mapper.insert: insert into courses ( id, owner_member_id, title, region_name, visibility, status, description, cover_image_url, curation_section, curation_order, created_at ) values ( #{id}, #{ownerMemberId}, #{title}, #{regionName}, #{visibility}, #{status}, #{description}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{curationSection}, #{curationOrder}, current_timestamp )
mapper.select: select from courses c where c.owner_member_id = #{ownerMemberId} and c.deleted_at is null order by c.created_at desc, c.id asc
select from courses c join members m on m.id = c.owner_member_id where m.role = 'ADMIN' and c.deleted_at is null order by c.updated_at desc nulls last, c.created_at desc, c.id asc
mapper.update: update courses set title = #{title}, region_name = #{regionName}, visibility = #{visibility}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, curation_section = #{curationSection}, curation_order = #{curationOrder}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and owner_member_id = #{ownerMemberId} and deleted_at is null

update courses set start_location =
ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)
null
where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into course_items ( course_id, item_type, attraction_id, note_id, position, day, memo, stay_minutes, created_at ) values ( #{courseId}, #{itemType}, #{attractionId}, #{noteId}, #{position}, #{day}, #{memo}, #{stayMinutes}, current_timestamp )

insert into course_items ( course_id, item_type, attraction_id, note_id, position, day, memo, stay_minutes, created_at ) values
( #{record.courseId}, #{record.itemType}, #{record.attractionId}, #{record.noteId}, #{record.position}, #{record.day}, #{record.memo}, #{record.stayMinutes}, current_timestamp )
mapper.select: select id, course_id as courseId, position from course_items where course_id = #{courseId} order by position asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into course_route_segments ( course_id, from_course_item_id, to_course_item_id, segment_order, travel_mode, duration_seconds, distance_meters ) values ( #{courseId}, #{fromCourseItemId}, #{toCourseItemId}, #{segmentOrder}, #{travelMode}, #{durationSeconds}, #{distanceMeters} )

insert into course_route_segments ( course_id, from_course_item_id, to_course_item_id, segment_order, travel_mode, duration_seconds, distance_meters ) values
( #{record.courseId}, #{record.fromCourseItemId}, #{record.toCourseItemId}, #{record.segmentOrder}, #{record.travelMode}, #{record.durationSeconds}, #{record.distanceMeters} )
mapper.select: select from course_route_segments s where s.course_id = #{courseId} order by s.segment_order asc
select from course_items i left join attractions a on a.id = i.attraction_id left join notes n on n.id = i.note_id where i.course_id = #{courseId} order by i.position asc, i.id asc

select from course_items i left join attractions a on a.id = i.attraction_id left join notes n on n.id = i.note_id where i.course_id = #{courseId} and ( (i.item_type = 'ATTRACTION' and ) or (i.item_type = 'NOTE' and ) ) order by i.position asc, i.id asc

with md_top as ( select from courses c where and c.curation_section = 'MD_RECOMMENDED' order by c.start_location <-> , c.id asc limit least(3, #{limit}) ), rest as ( select from courses c where and not exists ( select 1 from md_top m where m.id = c.id ) order by c.start_location <-> , c.id asc limit greatest(#{limit} - (select count(*) from md_top), 0) ) select feed.* from ( select 0 as feedBucket, md_top.* from md_top union all select 1 as feedBucket, rest.* from rest ) feed order by feed.feedBucket asc, feed.distanceMeters asc, feed.id asc
